item.name: La Noscean Jelly
item.description:
It was named as part of a movement to expunge the word “fish” from “jellyfish,” for reasons pertaining to consistency and accuracy, although this has met with little success thus far.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: The Seventh Umbral Calamity brought violent upheavals to Eorzea's flora and fauna, not the least of which was an explosion of La Noscea's jellyfish population. The fact that they nearly choke the shores of the region is made only slightly bearable by their relatively harmless sting.
